title: Latency Waterfall Visualization
description: Horizontal stacked bar chart breaking down chatbot response latency for a simple template query versus a complex RAG plus LLM query.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Analyze the latency contribution of each stage in a chatbot response pipeline and identify the dominant bottleneck.

pedagogical.interactionType: interactive chart with tooltips and annotations
